glosses.ja: ジーンズ; デニムパンツ

sentences.target: Ich brauche heute eine bequeme Jeans.

translations.de: Ich brauche heute eine bequeme Jeans.
translations.en: I need a comfortable pair of jeans today.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’un jean confortable aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi mi serve un paio di jeans comodi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天需要一条舒适的牛仔裤。
translations.yue: 我今日需要條舒服嘅牛仔褲。
translations.pt: Preciso de uma calça jeans confortável hoje.
translations.tr: Bugün rahat bir kot pantolona ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi cần một chiếc quần jean thoải mái.
translations.nl: Ik heb vandaag een comfortabele spijkerbroek nodig.
translations.hu: Ma szükségem van egy kényelmes farmernadrágra.
translations.hi: मुझे आज एक आरामदायक जींस चाहिए।
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en behagelig dongeribukse i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku butuh celana jeans yang nyaman.
translations.sv: Jag behöver ett par bekväma jeans idag.
translations.ro: Am nevoie astăzi de o pereche de blugi comozi.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for et par behagelige jeans i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は履き心地のいいジーンズが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main verb.
Temporal adverb; specifies time.
Indefinite article determiner, feminine singular accusative; introduces the direct object.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Jeans', inflected for feminine accusative.
Noun; feminine singular (plural-form noun used as singular), accusative; direct object.

translations.ko: 이 청바지가 너한테 더 잘 맞아.
translations.pt: Esta calça jeans fica melhor em você.
translations.tr: Bu kot pantolon sana daha iyi yakışıyor.
translations.vi: Chiếc quần jean này hợp với bạn hơn.
translations.hu: Ez a farmernadrág jobban áll neked.
translations.hi: यह जींस तुम पर ज़्यादा अच्छी बैठती है।
translations.pl: Te dżinsy lepiej na tobie leżą.
translations.el: Αυτό το τζιν σου πάει καλύτερα.
translations.id: Celana jeans ini lebih pas buat kamu.
translations.sv: De här jeansen passar dig bättre.
translations.ro: Blugii ăștia îți vin mai bine.
translations.da: De her jeans passer dig bedre.
translations.ja: このジーンズのほうがあなたに合っている。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Noun; feminine singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; experiencer/indirect object with 'passen'.
Comparative adverb; modifies the verb, indicating higher degree.

sentences.target: Meine alte Jeans hat ein Loch.

translations.de: Meine alte Jeans hat ein Loch.
translations.en: My old jeans have a hole.
translations.es: Mis jeans viejos tienen un agujero.
translations.fr: Mon vieux jean a un trou.
translations.it: I miei vecchi jeans hanno un buco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的旧牛仔裤破了一个洞。
translations.pt: Minha calça jeans velha tem um buraco.
translations.tr: Eski kot pantolonumda bir delik var.
translations.vi: Quần jean cũ của tôi bị thủng một lỗ.
translations.nl: Mijn oude spijkerbroek heeft een gat.
translations.hu: A régi farmernadrágomon van egy lyuk.
translations.hi: मेरी पुरानी जींस में एक छेद है।
translations.el: Το παλιό μου τζιν έχει μια τρύπα.
translations.nb: Den gamle dongeribuksa mi har et hull.
translations.id: Celana jeans lama saya ada lubang.
translations.sv: Mina gamla jeans har ett hål.
translations.ro: Blugii mei vechi au o gaură.
translations.da: Mine gamle jeans har et hul.
translations.ja: 私の古いジーンズに穴が開いている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Jeans'.
Noun; feminine singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb.
Indefinite article, neuter singular accusative; introduces the direct object.
Noun; neuter singular accusative; direct object.

sentences.target: Ich wasche die Jeans mit kaltem Wasser.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʃə diː d͡ʒiːns mɪt ˈkaltəm ˈvasɐ./

translations.de: Ich wasche die Jeans mit kaltem Wasser.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʃə diː d͡ʒiːns mɪt ˈkaltəm ˈvasɐ./
translations.en: I wash the jeans with cold water.
translations.es: Lavo los jeans con agua fría.
translations.fr: Je lave le jean à l’eau froide.
translations.it: Lavo i jeans con acqua fredda.
translations.ru: Я стираю джинсы в холодной воде.
translations.pt: Eu lavo a calça jeans com água fria.
translations.he: אני מכבס את הג'ינס במים קרים.
translations.vi: Tôi giặt quần jean bằng nước lạnh.
translations.nl: Ik was de spijkerbroek met koud water.
translations.uk: Я перу джинси в холодній воді.
translations.hi: मैं जींस को ठंडे पानी से धोता हूँ।
translations.el: Πλένω το τζιν με κρύο νερό.
translations.nb: Jeg vasker dongeribuksa i kaldt vann.
translations.id: Saya mencuci celana jeans dengan air dingin.
translations.sv: Jag tvättar jeansen i kallt vatten.
translations.da: Jeg vasker jeansene i koldt vand.
translations.ja: ジーンズは冷たい水で洗います。

Noun; neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'mit'.
